creator: solarcatcher@gmx.de
text:
Hi,

I was wondering if there was any option to make this port work with lang/php7* ? I recently upgraded from lang/php56 to lang/php70 and had to uninstall phpmyadmin because it depends on php56.

Upstream supports PHP 5.5, 5.6, 7.0, 7.1

It would be great to be able to use official FreeBSD packages of phpmyadmin also with php7*

Thanks for all the good work!
